comparisons.detail: AArch64 ET_REL; two clean builds reproduce candidate SHA-256 22f93083062922e5a2932e387d91db714e123896818e13a2ef853948308349e7
license, description, built_with, dependencies and aliases match
ZTE_TASKSTATS, two genl_ops, policies, commands and 0x160 payload reconstructed
Ghidra stock and candidate each export exactly 8 functions; call multiplicities and body sizes match; host harness covers all 8
8/8 functions match normalized instructions, relocations, section and symbol size; zte_taskstats_user_cmd is 473 instructions and 1892 bytes on both sides
3/3 indirect or entry-point type IDs, sections and symbol sizes match
8/8 functions directly covered; two test binaries are reproducible at SHA-256 7d58b5c976699c4997f7301020bd60d51cbf46728f3d0ab94d4c801b5af246e4
Generic Netlink interaction with real tasks and userspace requires a separate controlled session

justified_differences.justification: candidate targets the kernel release recorded in engenharia/config/target_kernel.json and was modposted with its Module.symvers
candidate contains build-environment vermagic, BTF/debug and reconstructed metadata; parity is established only on the explicitly measured static surfaces

blockers: independent reviewer distinct from the implementer
controlled hardware validation of ZTE_TASKSTATS Netlink behavior
